description: Sort the thread pane by TabMail action priority (reply > none > archive > delete), secondary by date. Sort-only — row painting lives in tmMessageListTableView. Action state is read from each message's `tm-action` mork string property (written by actionCache → tmHdr.setAction).

functions.name: init
functions.description: Initialise sorting logic for existing and future 3-pane windows.

functions.name: refresh
functions.description: Reapply Date→Tags sort on all open 3-pane windows (uses delayed sort mechanism).

functions.name: refreshImmediate
functions.description: Immediately reapply Date→Tags sort on all open 3-pane windows (bypasses delay).

functions.name: shutdown
functions.description: Clean up sorting listeners and unregister window listeners.
